HGSS.474.0000:
Mr. Fuji: Welcome.\f
Hmm... You appear to be raising your
Pokémon in a kind and loving manner.\f
Those who love Pokémon come here to
pay their respects to Pokémon.\f
Please pay homage to the spirits
of Pokémon.\f
I’m sure that will make them happy.
HGSS.474.0001:
There are other resting places of
Pokémon here, I think.\f
There are many chambers that only
Mr. Fuji may enter.
HGSS.474.0002:
I came with my mom to visit
Pokémon resting places...
HGSS.474.0003:
The Pokémon that lived with me a
long time...\f
I didn’t treat them as Pokémon!\r
I loved them like my grandchildren...
